name: SAP SuccessFactors
description: Monitor employee access, role-based permissions, and sync employee records from SAP SuccessFactors HCM platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. In Admin Center, go to Manage OAuth2 Client Applications or ensure OData API Basic Authentication is enabled for your company
2. Create or identify a technical API user
3. Grant the user Role-Based Permissions: View Users, Employee Central HRIS OData API, Manage Permission Roles (read)
4. Find your Company ID from the login page (the company field)
5. Find your API URL based on your data center:
   - US DC4: https://api4.successfactors.com
   - EU DC2: https://api2.successfactors.eu
   - DC8: https://api8.successfactors.com
   - DC10: https://api10.successfactors.com
   - See SAP Note 2215682 for all data center URLs

credentialFields.label: API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your SuccessFactors API URL for your data center. Examples: US DC4 = https://api4.successfactors.com, EU DC2 = https://api2.successfactors.eu, DC8 = https://api8.successfactors.com. Find in Admin Center > Company Settings.

credentialFields.label: Company ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your SuccessFactors Company ID (visible on the login page or in Admin Center).

credentialFields.label: API Username
credentialFields.helpText: Technical user with OData API access and RBP permissions for User entity and RBP roles.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies active employees in SAP SuccessFactors have complete profiles with email and name fields

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Role-Based Permission (RBP) roles are configured in SAP SuccessFactors to enforce least-privilege access controls
